// note: Cloudflare Worker code is a SEPARATE compilation target, built and bundled by wrangler — not by the workspace `tsc -b` (which excludes cloudflare/**/*). It needs Worker globals (@cloudflare/workers-types) instead of Node/DOM, so it cannot share the package tsconfig. Install `@cloudflare/workers-types` to typecheck this here: `npx tsc -p cloudflare/tsconfig.json`.
